fields.name: Full Service
fields.description: Comprehensive service including oil and filter change, fluid top-ups, brake check, tyre check, and full vehicle inspection.

fields.name: Interim Service
fields.description: A shorter service covering essential checks and oil and filter change. Ideal between full services.

fields.name: Oil Change
fields.description: Engine oil and filter replacement using manufacturer-recommended oil grade.

fields.name: Brake Pads Replacement
fields.description: Front or rear brake pad replacement with quality parts.

fields.name: Brake Discs and Pads Replacement
fields.description: Full brake disc and pad replacement for front or rear axle.

fields.name: MOT Test
fields.description: Annual MOT test to ensure your vehicle meets road safety and environmental standards.

fields.name: Pre-MOT Check
fields.description: A thorough inspection covering common MOT failure points before your test.

fields.name: Engine Diagnostic
fields.description: Full engine diagnostic scan to identify fault codes and performance issues.

fields.name: Gearbox Diagnostic
fields.description: Diagnostic scan of the gearbox and transmission system.

fields.name: General Diagnostic Scan
fields.description: Full vehicle diagnostic scan covering all major systems and fault codes.

fields.name: Tyre Fitting (per tyre)
fields.description: Supply and fitting of a single tyre. Price varies by tyre size and brand.

fields.name: Wheel Alignment
fields.description: Four-wheel alignment check and adjustment to manufacturer specifications.

fields.name: Battery Replacement
fields.description: 12V battery replacement with a quality battery suited to your vehicle.

fields.name: Battery Health Check
fields.description: Test your battery condition, charge level, and alternator output.

fields.name: Clutch Kit Replacement
fields.description: Full clutch kit replacement including clutch plate, pressure plate, and release bearing.

fields.name: Flywheel Replacement
fields.description: Dual mass flywheel replacement. Often recommended alongside clutch replacement.

fields.name: Exhaust Repair
fields.description: Repair of exhaust leaks, damaged sections, or loose fittings.

fields.name: Full Exhaust Replacement
fields.description: Complete exhaust system replacement from manifold to tailpipe.

fields.name: DPF Clean
fields.description: Diesel particulate filter cleaning to restore performance and reduce emissions.

fields.name: Catalytic Converter Replacement
fields.description: Replacement of the catalytic converter to restore emissions performance.

fields.name: Shock Absorbers Replacement
fields.description: Front or rear shock absorber replacement for improved ride and handling.

fields.name: Spring Replacement
fields.description: Coil spring replacement for front or rear suspension.

fields.name: Drop Links Replacement
fields.description: Anti-roll bar drop link replacement to reduce knocking and improve stability.

fields.name: Air Conditioning Regas
fields.description: Air conditioning system regas and leak check to restore cooling performance.

fields.name: Coolant Flush
fields.description: Full coolant system flush and refill with fresh antifreeze.

fields.name: EV Battery Health Check
fields.description: High voltage battery health check including cell condition and charge capacity.

fields.name: Charging Port Inspection
fields.description: Inspection of the charging port, cable, and connection for wear or faults.

fields.name: Electric Motor Diagnostic
fields.description: Full diagnostic of the electric motor, inverter, and power electronics.

fields.name: EV Software Diagnostic
fields.description: Software and firmware diagnostic check for EV systems and error codes.

fields.name: EV / Hybrid Full Service
fields.description: Comprehensive EV or hybrid service including battery check, brake inspection, coolant check, and full vehicle diagnostic.
